proposal_summary: This proposal transfers the proposer and canceller roles from the current Arbitrum Core Governor and Arbitrum Treasury Governor to newly deployed Governor contracts to upgrade the governance infrastructure.

disclosed_entities.name: Current Arbitrum Core Governor
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: transfer the proposer and canceller roles from the current Arbitrum Core Governor

disclosed_entities.name: Current Arbitrum Treasury Governor
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: transfer the proposer and canceller roles from the current Arbitrum Core Governor and Arbitrum Treasury Governor

claimed_actions.raw_action: Grant the newly deployed Core Governor and Treasury Governor contracts the 'PROPOSER_ROLE' and 'CANCELLER_ROLE' on the timelock contract.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: The new Governor contracts will have the ability to propose and cancel proposals on the timelock.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Grant the newly deployed Core Governor and Treasury Governor contracts the 'PROPOSER_ROLE' and 'CANCELLER_ROLE' on the timelock contract.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Revoke the current Core Governor and Treasury Governor contracts' 'PROPOSER_ROLE' and 'CANCELLER_ROLE' on the timelock contract.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: The old Governor contracts will no longer have the ability to execute proposals.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Revoke the current Core Governor and Treasury Governor contracts' 'PROPOSER_ROLE' and 'CANCELLER_ROLE' on the timelock contract.

claimed_complexity.reason: Involves changing multiple roles for several contracts on a timelock
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: transfer the proposer and canceller roles

limitations: Addresses for current Governors and timelock contract are not disclosed
